rows.label: tev013901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev013901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Roscoll about the Collepedian Union.

rows.label: tev013901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev013901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Roscoll if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev013901_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Roscoll about the Collepedian Union.

rows.label: tev013901_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Roscoll about collectibles.

rows.label: tev013901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Roscoll about recent developments.

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Even merely maintaining our current
front lines requires ludicrous
amounts of money and materials.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0002
rows.name:
It was difficult enough on Earth, but
supporting a military on a planet like this
requires resources on a whole other scale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Which means we Collepedian need to
secure sufficient resources here on
Mira to fuel BLADE's military activities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Otherwise, it will be impossible to sustain offensives
against our new enemies, search for the Lifepoint,
or continue countless other BLADE projects.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0005
rows.name:
It's not the most glamorous line of work. But when
I came to understand how important it was to the
continuance of BLADE, I knew I had to join up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0008
rows.name:
Our resource-transport helicopters are
constantly being attacked by indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0009
rows.name:
So far, Howard and Ciska have
managed to evade the attacks with
quick thinking and spry reflexes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0010
rows.name:
But I know it's only a matter of
time before our luck runs out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0011
rows.name:
We've asked the Interceptor to help
clear our flight paths of indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0012
rows.name:
But they have a lot on their plates
right now, so it could be a bit.
I hope they get to it soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0020
rows.name:
One of our duties as Collepedian is
creating a database of all the items
that can be harvested from Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0021
rows.name:
You should have access to the same
database on your own comm device.
It's the one marked "Collepedia."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0022
rows.name:
If you register enough data about the
flora and fauna that you happen to
gather, you'll receive special rewards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0023
rows.name:
You can also find missions to
collect materials at Quest Board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0024
rows.name:
Sometimes you'll have to face tough choices between
handing materials over to clients for rewards, or else
keeping them for your Collepedia. So, er, good luck![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0030
rows.name:
We refer to the collectibles that
we can't categorize as "curios."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0031
rows.name:
The first BLADE who discovers
one of these items is officially
allowed to name it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG0032
rows.name:
It must feel like discovering
a new star or something![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG1013
rows.name:
I reported to Commander Vandham about
that accident we had recently, but he
already knew about your involvement.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG1014
rows.name:
When I told him that all of the personnel
and cargo were safe, he seemed happy about
the outcome. I guess I'm happy too, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG1015
rows.name:
Well, at least this experience should lead
Howard and Ciska to grow up a little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG1016
rows.name:
It sure as hell better! They're
still arguing about whose fault
the damn accident was.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG2017
rows.name:
We lost a precious helicopter full
of valuable cargo, and then we lost
Howard as well. What a tragedy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG2018
rows.name:
Oh, but don't feel that you're responsible.
After all, Ciska is still alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG2019
rows.name:
I'm sure she feels terrible about how
much she and Howard used to fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG2020
rows.name:
And I know she's training hard in new flight
techniques so she'll be able to evade more skillfully
the next time she encounters a flying indigen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013901_MSG2021
rows.name:
I suppose we'll all have to grow
strong and overcome our grief if
we hope to survive on Mira.[ST:wait ]
